Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Dread's obsession with recapturing his shard overrules all reason. Rusty Rose agrees the shard is too powerful for any one person, including Sonic.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Rebel Rouge and Renegade Knuckles walk the newly liberated streets of New Yoke City unsure of what's next, until the Mothership redocks atop the Yoke.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Halmoni becomes a master hacker in 'Halmoni Learns the Internet', then in 'The Library', Lily must retrieve a book from a horrifying maze of unknown terrors.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Will and Min have a disastrous date in 'Date Night', then in 'Behind the Jingle', the family writes a chart-topping jingle.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Boog accepts a dangerous fishing challenge in 'Fish Out of Water', then in 'Mukluk', Elliot finds a creature he believes to be good luck.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The campers stumble across a mythical creature in 'Breaking Big', then in 'The Polar Empress', A mysterious stranger comes to Camp for refuge.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The boys accidently break Dave's new flat screen TV in 'The Fugitives', and in 'Sherlock Chipmunk', Jeanette and Eleanor act as Sherlock Holmes and Watson when Theodore's teddy disappears.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The boys build a treehouse in the backyard and move out in 'Independence Day', and in 'Opposites Attract', an invention of Simon's accidently magnetizes Alvin and Simon to each other.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their 'Life Insurance' protects them from any danger, then in 'Burst Your Bubble', SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, and everyone in town wants one.
